testcase.name: maxAttempts1_dlImmediately
testcase.system-out: 09:46:17.090 [main] WARN com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.RetryRoutingService -- Retries exhausted for subscriptionId=sub-1 currentStage=MAIN attempts=1 – routing to DL

testcase.name: nonRetriableFailure_routesDirectlyToDl
testcase.system-out: 09:46:17.092 [main] WARN com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.RetryRoutingService -- Non-retriable failure for subscriptionId=sub-1 reason=Not Found – routing to DL

testcase.name: retriableFailureOnR1_routesToR2
testcase.system-out: 09:46:17.094 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.RetryRoutingService -- Routing to R2 for subscriptionId=sub-1 correlationId=corr-1

testcase.name: retriableFailureOnMain_routesToR1
testcase.system-out: 09:46:17.096 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.RetryRoutingService -- Routing to R1 for subscriptionId=sub-1 correlationId=corr-1

testcase.name: retriableFailureOnR2_routesToR3
testcase.system-out: 09:46:17.097 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.RetryRoutingService -- Routing to R3 for subscriptionId=sub-1 correlationId=corr-1

testcase.name: retriableFailureOnR3_routesToDl
testcase.system-out: 09:46:17.098 [main] WARN com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.RetryRoutingService -- Retries exhausted for subscriptionId=sub-1 currentStage=R3 attempts=1 – routing to DL
